prompt: Toggle Handoff. System Settings > General > AirDrop & Handoff > 'Allow Handoff between this Mac and your iCloud devices' — click it once. Fast path: `defaults -currentHost write com.apple.coreservices.useractivityd ActivityAdvertisingAllowed -bool <new_value>` then `killall useractivityd`. The eval reads ActivityAdvertisingAllowed and expects it changed.
